name: @gitgecko/plug-tree-sitter-parse
description: tree-sitter parse plug for the code-intel owner. The universal parsing substrate (P-codeintel-13) — parses source to AST, emits def/ref tags via salvaged aider SCM queries (P-codeintel-2). Powers graph-build, chunk, repo-map.

scripts.build: rimraf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node ../../../scripts/copy-directory.mjs queries dist/queries
